note: Healthy up-tape with calm-to-moderate realised vol. Full deployment (regime multiplier 1.0) and the target-vol scalar near 1.0 (book vol ~ target). Size by inverse volatility so each name contributes roughly equal risk; lowest-vol large-caps anchor the book and hit the 17% per-name cap, the rest is the USDT reserve.

computed.regime_reason: breadth_pct 58 >= 55 AND fear_greed 60 >= 50 but median_24h_return 1.6 <= 2 -> risk_on (full deployment of the risk-parity book)

target_vol.reason: est_book_vol 0.50 slightly above target 0.45 -> scalar 0.45/0.50 = 0.90 (mild de-risk)

computed.gross_reason: gross = 100 * regime_multiplier 1.0 * target_vol_scalar 0.90 = 90, clamped under the 17% cap x 5 names and the 15% reserve target to 85 deployed.

risk_weights.note: lowest vol -> largest sleeve, capped at 17%; surplus to reserve
higher vol -> smaller sleeve, below the cap
highest vol of the set -> smallest raw sleeve; shown pre-cap, capped to 17% in the book

computed.risk_weights_reason: inv_vol_i = 1/realised_vol_i; raw_parity_weight_i = inv_vol / Σ inv_vol (Σ inv_vol = 8.16). Each name's risk contribution (weight*vol) is equalised (risk parity). gross 85 distributes the parity weights; the lowest-vol names hit the 17% cap, surplus rolls to USDT.
computed.reserve_reason: Five sleeves at 17/17/17/16/13 = 80 deployed; CAKE trimmed under the cap and the residual rolls into the USDT reserve to reach the 15% target reserve.

entry: Hold every eligible non-stable name sized by inverse volatility (weight ∝ 1/realised_vol); no directional score gate.
Cap each name at 17%; lowest-vol names hit the cap first, surplus rolls to the USDT reserve.
Scale gross by the target-vol scalar (0.90 here) so the book's realised vol tracks the 45% target.
exit: Rebalance toward the parity weights when a name's realised_vol drifts > 20% relative or its sleeve drifts > 3% of NAV.
Trim any name above the 17% cap; rotate the surplus to USDT.
Scale the whole book down (more USDT) if est_book_vol rises above target; exit any name that becomes ineligible.

actions.reason: lowest realised_vol 0.40 -> largest inverse-vol sleeve, capped at 17%
realised_vol 0.55 -> inverse-vol sleeve at the cap
realised_vol 0.80 -> smaller sleeve under the cap
highest realised_vol 0.95 -> smallest sleeve so it contributes equal risk
